# Drilling Data

**Summary**: Data collected from sensors during the drilling process, including static and dynamic parameters.

---

## How It Appears in the Thesis Collection

- [[2022-algharbi|ALGHARBI, 2022]] analyzed various types of drilling data to identify flaws caused by environment or transmission.

## Scientific Context

- [[2022-algharbi|ALGHARBI, 2022]] Essential for real-time monitoring in Remote Operation Centers (RTOC).

## Measurement and Characterization Methods

- [[2022-algharbi|ALGHARBI, 2022]] Collected via sensors on the drilling rig.

## Key Findings Across Sources

- Dynamic data is typically high-frequency (seconds base) and often contains noise. ([[2022-algharbi|ALGHARBI, 2022, p. 44]])
